SCRAPYARD_KEYWORD_INITIATIVE.title: Initiative
SCRAPYARD_KEYWORD_INITIATIVE.description: Triggers its Initiative effect when played as the first card each turn.
SCRAPYARD_KEYWORD_FOLLOW_UP.title: Follow-Up
SCRAPYARD_KEYWORD_FOLLOW_UP.description: Triggers its Follow-Up effect if this card's cost and the previously played card's cost are multiples of each other.
SCRAPYARD_KEYWORD_DECISIVE.title: Decisive
SCRAPYARD_KEYWORD_DECISIVE.description: Triggers its Decisive effect if this card has the highest cost in your hand.
